Horror of the Fallen Crossbow

When attacking, has a 30-33% chance of dealing 145-165% damage in 2 seconds.

Attacks have a 25% chance of shooting 3 extra arrows at random enemies. The arrows deal 100% of the damage done by the attack and set the target on fire. When set on fire, the target is struck with fear and takes 20000 damage over 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
